channel.title: Finance 新闻汇总 - Free News Agent
channel.description: Finance 分类的最新新闻汇总，由 Free News Agent 自动生成，Gemini AI 筛选优质内容。

item.title: OpenAI readies IPO filing to list as soon as September

item.title: Nvidia to return more than $80bn to shareholders as it reaps rewards of AI boom

item.title: An updated ‘misery index’ shows economic stress is nearing a warning zone as stocks push higher
item.description: <![CDATA[An updated ‘misery index’ shows economic stress is nearing a warning zone as stocks push higher]]>

item.title: Pentagon official’s Beijing visit in doubt over $14bn US arms package for Taiwan
item.description: <![CDATA[Pentagon official’s Beijing visit in doubt over $14bn US arms package for Taiwan]]>
